what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record that registers an image asset named p-25 in the design-source channel under the capital-raise path, pointing to a blob and labeling it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address image://design-source/capital-raise/p-25, channel design-source, path capital-raise/p-25, blob blob://b2:2211c8290e5faeba66c7c51102806934, mime image/jpeg, name p-25, width 0, height 0, source design_source_material, author_session ch-3mpkjg3r, created timestamp, and an empty links array.
The body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-25.jpg'.
standouts: An image/jpeg entry records width and height as 0.
It is explicitly tagged as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'.
The asset is referenced only by a blob URI with no links to other records.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata.
Uses image:// and blob:// URI schemes.
Body uses a terse 'SOURCE design ground-truth — filename' caption style.
concerns: Width and height are 0 for an image record.
No descriptive caption, alt text, or content summary.
No links or relationships to other ledger entries.
Blob integrity or retrievability cannot be verified from this file.
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source JPEG named p-25 in the capital-raise folder, tagged as ground-truth but missing dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0x0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-25.jpg contain?
How does this asset relate to other capital-raise or design-source entries?
Is the referenced blob currently reachable?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to serve as a design ground-truth source record for an image; the file only provides metadata and a storage pointer, not the image itself, so it functions as a catalog entry rather than a content record.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a canonical, addressable reference for a design image used in capital-raise materials, enabling lookup by id, address, or blob.
novelty: The image dimensions are recorded as zero despite the mime type being image/jpeg, and the record carries a terse 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label rather than a descriptive caption.
contribution: Provides a stable addressable identity and storage pointer for a design-source image asset, along with provenance metadata such as author session, creation time, and source label, which a fused system can use to resolve and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for an image/jpeg asset named p-25 in the design-source/capital-raise channel, referencing blob b2:2211c8290e5faeba66c7c51102806934 and labeled as design ground-truth, with zero recorded dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To register and make addressable a source design image used in capital-raise materials.
